docket_entries.description: NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT SENT TO RASHAUD ROBERTSON RETURNED--MOVED, LEFT NO ADDRESS

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF C & C OF S.F.: OFC OF TREAS & TAX COLLECTOR RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ROBERTSON, RASHAUD $1,727.29 PRINCIPAL, $45.87 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,773.16, DEFENDANT FAILED TO APPEAR. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
